holdings.infoBox: VFLO is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 7.48%, Dell Technologies at 6.26%, The Cigna Group at 3.21%, Omnicom Group at 2.98%, and Zoom Communications at 2.82%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares Free Cash Flow ETF (VFLO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Victory US Large Cap Free Cash Flow index. The fund tracks an index composed of the largest U.S. companies based on profit that are perceived to have strong free cash flow yields and high growth metrics VFLO was launched on Jun 21, 2023 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Victory US Large Cap Free Cash Flow Index
